data.body: PREREQ VERIFIED (subagent): ba33 read layer + enriched fields landed on main. Data contract for the UI: rebar.audit.read.audit_trail(ticket_id) -> {ticket, plan_reviews[] (newest-first v2 payloads: findings[] with finding/criteria/location/evidence/scenarios/impact/suggested_fix/verification/validity/priority/decision/reason/block_threshold/blocking_enabled; coaching[] {move_id,finding_refs,...}; verdict/model/metrics/coverage/material_fingerprint), completion {attestation, sidecar{criteria[] of {criterion,met,citation,kind kind in codebase-verifiable|operator-attested}}}, code_reviews[] [{ticket_id, sidecars[] code_review_result_v2 with blocking/advisory/dropped/indeterminate buckets + coaching}]}. Read layer is best-effort/never-raises; legacy rounds may lack v2 fields (guard None). reviewbot stack = src/rebar/review_bot/app.py (FastAPI lazy-imported at app.py top only; extra 'reviewbot'=[fastapi,uvicorn[standard],boto3]). EPIC 2141 CLAIMED (in_progress).
